summary: Completed testing of collapsible CRM sections and new user roles (lead, collaborator, editor, manager). All 8 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including collapsible sections, role dropdown, user creation with 'lead' role, and role display in users table.
critical_code_review_comments: User form now has 5 collapsible sections with toggle functionality
Role dropdown supports 6 roles: lead, client, collaborator, editor, manager, admin
Backend UserCreate model accepts any role string without validation
Role badges in users table use color coding: admin(red), manager(orange), editor(purple), collaborator(cyan), lead(yellow), client(blue)
'Dati Aziendali' (Business Data) section only appears when client_type is 'business' or 'foreign'
Collapsible sections use crmSections state object with toggleCrmSection() function
seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New user roles fully implemented. Backend POST /api/admin/users accepts role field with values: lead, client, collaborator, editor, manager, admin. Frontend user form has collapsible sections: ANAGRAFICA (expanded by default), DATI AZIENDALI (conditional), SOCIAL & WEB, MARKETING & CRM, NOTE & STORICO. Role dropdown at bottom shows all 6 roles with emoji icons.
features_verified: User form collapsible sections with chevron toggle
ANAGRAFICA section expanded by default with personal fields
SOCIAL & WEB section with social media fields and follow checkboxes
MARKETING & CRM section with lead source, referral, client status fields
NOTE & STORICO section with notes and purchase history
DATI AZIENDALI section appears only for business/foreign client types
Role dropdown with all 6 roles: lead, client, collaborator, editor, manager, admin
Create user with role 'lead' - success with toast message
Role badges display correctly in users table with color coding
Edit user form shows current role and allows modification
Backend accepts new roles (lead, collaborator, editor, manager) via POST /api/admin/users
